prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood lighting. A feminine ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch steadies a metal shield on a workbench while an androgynous ranger with a matching green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch guides a repair tool carefully, cooperative hands, no sparks hitting skin, cinematic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. The androgynous ranger taps the final repair mark on the shield while the feminine ranger holds it steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm forge atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
